column2: CAA Case Officer Cannot Open Valid Case with Incomplete Operational Authorisation Pack
column3: ['The tester logs into the system as a CAA Case Officer. ', "The tester retrieves the applicant's Operational Authorisation (OA) pack from the system. ", 'The tester reviews the OA pack against the compliance checklist provided in CAP 722A, Edition 2. ', 'The tester attempts to open a new case for the applicant. ']
column4: ['The tester is able to access the system and is logged in as a CAA Case Officer. ', 'The tester successfully obtains the OA pack for the specified applicant. ', 'The tester identifies that the OA pack is incomplete according to the compliance checklist. ', 'The system prevents the opening of a new case due to the incompleteness of the OA pack. ']
